meta.hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json - zero repo/network reads at verdict time; every constant below copied verbatim from the PROPOSAL 055 block / idea doc / the two firsthand pins at drafting-intake time

faucet.daily_tiers_verbatim:
# Daily reward tiers  (label, rarity_emoji, min, max, base_weight)
_DAILY_TIERS = [
    ("Common", "⬜", 500, 999, 45),
    ("Uncommon", "🟩", 1000, 1999, 25),
    ("Rare", "🟦", 2000, 2999, 15),
    ("Epic", "🟪", 3000, 3999, 8),
    ("Legendary", "🟧", 4000, 4999, 5),
    ("Mythic", "🟥", 5000, 5000, 2),
]
faucet.pick_daily_verbatim:
def _pick_daily(streak: int) -> tuple[int, str, str]:
    """Return (amount, tier_label, rarity_emoji) for a daily claim."""
    weights = _daily_weights(streak)
    tier = random.choices(_DAILY_TIERS, weights=weights, k=1)[0]
    label, emoji, low, high, _ = tier
    return random.randint(low, high), label, emoji
faucet.registration_numerator_note_anomaly_A1: the PROPOSAL 055 block and idea doc write the per-value table as '{9, 25, 15, 8, 5}/10^5 per ranged value + 2000/10^5 on the 5000 atom'. The Common row is a DENOMINATOR SLIP: Common spans 500 values (500..999), so 45/100 over 500 values = 9/10^4 per value = 90/10^5, not 9/10^5 (which would leave total pmf mass 0.595, contradicting the same registration's own 'weights sum 100' and E = 169201/100 exact). The committed source table is unambiguous; F1 asserts the source-derived exact table {90, 25, 15, 8, 5, atom 2000}/10^5 AND the reconciliation Fraction(9, 10^4) == Common per-value probability. Reported first-class; decision unaffected.
faucet.streak_weight_disclosure_anomaly_A3: _daily_weights(streak) @ superbot 3477594 shifts weight from Common/Uncommon toward higher tiers as streak grows (luck = min(streak, 60), shift = luck * 0.25, taken from tiers 0/1, redistributed to tiers 2-5). The REGISTERED model rides the BASE weights (streak-0 / i.i.d. claims) - the streak-0 floor. Direction stated by the registration itself ('streak mechanics would concentrate T further - the age-badge direction'): real streaks only accelerate crossing, so a REJECT under base weights is robust to the disclosed streak mechanic. Reported first-class; decision unaffected.

badge.banner_verbatim:
# --- achievements (fun layer) — deterministic badges over snapshot data ----
#
# Every threshold is documented here, next to the check that uses it.
# Achievements are a pure derivation: same snapshot in, same badges out —
# no state, no clock, no randomness.
badge.calibration_comment_L1_packrat_verbatim:
# Packrat: total mining_inventory count at/above this. Chosen against the
# committed sample so some miners hit it (SilverSeeker 212, CavernCrawler
# 227) and some don't (DeepDelver 193, MagmaMaven 80, PebblePicker 51).
PACKRAT_THRESHOLD = 200
badge.calibration_comment_L2_coin_magnate_verb:
# Coin Magnate: coins at/above this. Sample: DeepDelver 18450 and
# MagmaMaven 25990 hit; SilverSeeker 7320 and below don't.
COIN_MAGNATE_THRESHOLD = 10_000
badge.badge_check_verbatim:
if isinstance(miner.get("coins"), int) \
            and miner["coins"] >= COIN_MAGNATE_THRESHOLD:
        earned.append("coin_magnate")
badge.shared_wallet_contract_verbatim:
mining state lives per `(suid, guild_id)` and is mutated only through
`disbot/services/mining_workflow.py` (single-transaction ops); `coins` is
mutated only by `economy_service`; `xp` comes from `game_xp_service`.
badge.shared_wallet_field_row_verbatim: | `coins` | integer ≥ 0 | yes | Coin balance. | `economy_service` (sole coin mutator) |

sample.source: data/sample_snapshot.json @ superbot-mineverse b983291 (fields used by earned_achievements, copied verbatim)

registered_derived_table.record_depth_vs_max_depth: max_depth 3; DeepDelver 3, MagmaMaven 3 (deep_diver saturates: record_depth in {0..3} caps at the contract's own max - two of seven sample miners already hold it)

player_model.description: invented-but-pinned (registered): fresh wallet 0; per day, claim with probability p (one draw from the committed pmf), then spend floor(sigma*claim) back into sinks the same day - net increment = claim - floor(sigma*claim); savings never spent (direction stated: a sink that also taxes savings only slows T - generous to APPROVE); with probability 1-p no claim, wallet unchanged. T = first day wallet >= 10,000. Non-daily faucets EXCLUDED (direction stated: every extra faucet only accelerates T, REJECT-robust; V062 measured the farm alone at up to 4.77 dailies/day).

reject.arm_s_confirmation: every firing cell within 1/100 absolute AND >= 4*SE headroom above 19/20

null_axes: concentration-miss (P-band fires, median conjunct fails; knob: H)
arm disagreement (a firing Arm-A cell loses the band in Arm S)

seeds.construction_convention: RNGs constructed in pinned order 20261357 -> 20261358 -> 20261359 via a recording factory; the aux seed 20261360 is NEVER constructed and never read by any number (asserted); new registry high-water 20261360 (reserved by registration)

cstar_menu.rule: C* = exact minimal integer C with P(T <= 90) <= 1/2, per decision cell
cstar_menu.machinery_note: wallet is strictly non-decreasing (net = claim - floor(sigma*claim) >= 50 > 0 on every claim), so P(T <= 90 | threshold C) = P(W_90 >= C) exactly; the day-90 unabsorbed wallet law is computed exactly per decision cell via the binomial-mixture decomposition W_90 = S_K, K ~ Binomial(90, p) independent of claim values, S_k built by exact capped convolution (cap 100,000 + monotone overflow bucket); ASSERTED against the registered absorbing DP at C = 10,000 on every decision cell (exact Fraction equality)

at_p1_sigma0.P_T_le_2_derivation: (2/100)^2 - the two-Mythic path is the only 2-day path (5000+5000 = 10000; any other pair <= 9999)

fixture_level_choices_disclosed.bernoulli_convention: claim on day d iff rng.random() < float(p) - one RNG consumption every day of every trajectory including p = 1
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.value_draw_convention: on claim days only: tier index via rng.choices(range(6), weights=[45,25,15,8,5,2], k=1)[0] then value via rng.randint(lo, hi) - tier-then-uniform exactly as economy_helpers._pick_daily draws it, at base (streak-0) weights
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.trajectory_shape: every trajectory simulates the full 90-day horizon regardless of crossing day (T recorded at first crossing); draw sentinels: bernoulli draws == N*90 exactly per cell, value draws == claim events exactly per cell, and value draws == bernoulli draws on p = 1 cells
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.mc_loop_order: sigma ascending, p descending, trajectories sequential (registered); decision leg has the single sigma 1/2; reporting leg order sigma 0 then 9/10, p descending within each
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.se_convention: SE = sqrt(p_A * (1 - p_A) / N) with p_A the exact Arm-A value (exact-variance convention, float by disclosure - the V064 precedent)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.reporting_leg_N: 10,000 per cell (fixture-level choice; the registration pins N only for the decision leg 20,000 and stability leg 10,000)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.reporting_sanity_tolerance: reporting-only MC cells must land within 0.025 (5*max SE at N = 10,000) of their exact Arm-A values - sanity self-check, never decision-bearing
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.median_convention: median T = minimal n with P(T <= n) >= 1/2 (exact integer cross-multiplication); undefined within the computed horizon = +infinity for monotonicity comparisons
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.twin_evaluators: two independently-written decision evaluators - one procedural on Fractions, one table-driven on pure-integer cross-multiplication - must agree on the headline ruling and the stability ruling
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.no_wall_clock: no timestamps, no wall-clock, no environment paths in stdout or results.json; byte-identity across two process runs verified by EXTERNAL sha256
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.arm_a_horizon: decision cells (sigma = 1/2) run 180 days (H pair 30/180 read off the same exact law); reporting sigma worlds (0, 9/10) run 90 days; the (p=1, sigma=0) cell runs 20 days (T <= 20 with probability exactly 1, asserted)

drafter_reference_never_gated.note: drafting-time float DP, run and disclosed in PROPOSAL 055; the sim re-derives from scratch and must not trust these; compared, REPORTED, never gated (the V064 discipline)
